message.body: im lowkey on that shit frame 1

appreciate the absurdity of it dont actually get into a discussion about algorithms in the replies
because i sure as hell do not have any respectable takes on the matter i am a slave to the algorithms

i really like that shit's pacing

its not like a cat final or cantata final
its more like a you'll pass it in 10 tries max

atleast i feel like i get it around that

difference between satan energies some times vs satan energies all the time

all hope just in the trash

(real he used ai to make a thumbnail for his youtube stream)

assuming not too many chokes and unlucks

i wanted to know what it meant...
